findings.issue: Choice markers mixed within one question: A/B then дёҷ/дёҒ (CJK ordinals). Inconsistent labeling breaks UX and answer-key resolution.
findings.recommended_fix: Normalize all zh choice prefixes to A/B/C/D across the entire question set.

findings.issue: zh uses CJK ordinals з”Ід№ҷдёҷдёҒ instead of A/B/C/D; en uses A/B/C/D. Cross-lang inconsistency.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace з”І/д№ҷ/дёҷ/дёҒ with A/B/C/D in zh choices.

findings.issue: Same CJK-ordinal vs Latin-letter mismatch as Q2.
findings.recommended_fix: Normalize zh choice markers to A/B/C/D.

findings.issue: CJK ordinals з”Ід№ҷдёҷдёҒ in zh choices.
findings.recommended_fix: Normalize zh choice markers to A/B/C/D.

notes: Translation content (stems, choice bodies) faithful and fluent. Defects are purely choice-marker normalization. Q0 only is fully clean.
